boundary_behavior.x_to_one_third: G degenerates only: flipped SU(5)xU(1), one extra U(1)
boundary_behavior.x_to_zero: G and F degenerate: G_LR with massless W_R^pm + extra neutral

branch_classification.sm_window: x in (0, 1/3) on the real D-flat slice

checks.name: branch parametrization reproduces the HEAD F-flat sample (x = 0.1)
F-flatness DERIVED: all five F-terms of the explicit singlet W vanish on the AG branch (c_sigma = 1), 200-point x grid
the transcribed neutral G chiral block EQUALS the derived singlet Hessian under the field map (p, sqrt3 a, sqrt6 w, i*sqrt2 sigma, -i*sqrt2 bar_sigma)
exact special points on the cubic (branch engine self-test)
xi grid solved (401 points, [-10, 10]): every xi has 3 cubic roots and the SM window x in (0, 1/3) is populated
interior SM point (x = 0.15): all five full mixed blocks non-singular -> unbroken group is exactly the SM (12 = 45 - 33 generators)

x -> 1/3 boundary (flipped SU(5)xU(1)): the G AND E vector masses vanish (13 = 1 + 12 extra massless vectors: extra U(1) plus the flipped X',Y' bosons (3,2,1/6)+c.c.), F/J/X vectors stay massive -- validates the E assignment
x -> 0 boundary (G_LR): the G and F vector masses vanish (3 = 1 + 2 extra massless vectors: neutral + W_R^pm), E/J/X vectors stay massive -- validates the F assignment

x -> 1/2 boundary (SU(5), complex-sigma D-flat slice): exactly the X vector mass vanishes (12 extra massless vectors: the Georgi-Glashow X,Y bosons (3,2,-5/6)+c.c.), G/E/F/J vectors stay massive -- validates the X assignment (J = (3,1,2/3) follows by elimination and the 33-count)
each mixed sector has EXACTLY one chiral zero mode (J^dagger J kernel dim = 1)
Goldstone alignment: the chiral null vector IS the gauge-orbit direction from the gaugino row (residual < 1e-10 in every sector)
no tachyons in the transcribed sectors: all nonzero J^dagger J eigenvalues positive at the SM vacuum (tree level)
super-Higgs: every FULL mixed block is non-singular (all 33 Goldstones eaten)
Goldstone bookkeeping: 1 + 2 + 6 + 12 + 12 = 33 = 45 - 12
alignment reproduces at a second SM-window point (x = 0.22)
chiral null ratios reproduce the HEAD ledger gates at x = 0.1
det M_doublet(M_H) linear in M_H; fine-tuned root found
exactly one light doublet pair at M_H* (smallest singular value ~ 0, next one O(1))
light-doublet composition exported and normalized
triplet block at M_H* remains non-singular (no light color triplet; d = 5 proton channel stays suppressed by heavy masses)
triplet determinant reproduces the HEAD value at the HEAD sample (M_H = 0.67)
every exported state carries all schema-required fields (29 states x 12 fields)
heavy spectrum is non-placeholder: real benchmark masses for 7 sectors (29 states), partiality explicitly flagged

sector_sm_assignment_source: AG hep-ph/0405074 items a)-e), source lines 1203-1328 (Y_AG = 2*Y_SM); cross-checked 2026-07-05 against the fetched arXiv source; boundary degeneracies independently validate G, E, F, X (J by elimination)
